sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: How much is the life-time membership of the Society?
How much does the ordinary membership cost per year?
What are the opening times on week-days?
What is the arts programme at the Society like?

sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER.

questions.content: What TWO changes to the organization of this year’s festival are mentioned?

sections.instruction: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: What does the speaker say about the judges in the competitions?
options: A Most people judging will have some experience
B None of the judges will have experience
C Every judge will be experienced

questions.content: The winner in each of the competitions will
options: B be awarded a cash prize

questions.content: The profits from the marathon will be given to the Children’s Hospital to help
options: C provide books for the children

questions.content: Wardens will be needed at the car park because
options: A they helped organize the parking well last year
B the parking last year was disorganized
C they will be needed to collect parking fees

questions.content: Bags will be provided by the council
options: C only for material that can be recycled

options: B they benefit women more than men
C they favour men rather than women

questions.content: Which TWO aspects of the role-play examination are mentioned?

sections.instruction: Complete the summary below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content: In the problem-solving tests, students had to work in groups of four people and (26) {{BLANK}} to solve a problem. As they discussed the problem, (27) {{BLANK}} watched them. Re-sits of the final exams are held in September. After that any problems are dealt with by (30) {{BLANK}}.

sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: The Indian Ocean differs from the Atlantic and Pacific Oceans
options: A by being closed in to the north
B by being warmer than both
C by extending into cold regions

questions.content: Approximately how much of the world’s total ocean area does the Indian Ocean constitute?

options: A the tip of a submerged ridge
B the result of a volcanic eruption
C structurally part of the continent of Africa

sections.instruction: Complete the flow-chart below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content:
Step 1: Ship off Antarctica
Step 2: Buoys anchored at sea
Step 3: Five buoys off Antarctica which are (36) {{BLANK}} and icebergs
